debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
A : Set α
hA : A ∈ ↑𝓒
B : Set α
hB : B ∈ ↑𝓒
hAB :
  Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff A (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)) = Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff B (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B))
this : symmDiff (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
⊢ A = B

failed_attempts:
have hU : Set.range (Subtype.val :
        ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) → α) = (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := by
    ext x; constructor
    · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩; exact y.property
    · intro hx; exact ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, rfl⟩
  simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  have hUAB :
      ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ (A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) =
      ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ (B ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) := by
    simpa [hU] using hAB
  have hA' : A ⊆ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) := by
    intro x hx; exact Set.mem_biUnion hA hx
  have hB' : B ⊆ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) := by
    intro x hx; exact Set.mem_biUnion hB hx
  have hI : (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx; exact (Set.mem_biInter_iff).1 hx A hA
  have hJ : (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ⊆ B := by
    intro x hx; exact (Set.mem_biInter_iff).1 hx B hB
  have hABsub : A ⊆ B := by
    intro x hx
    by_cases hxI : x ∈ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
    · exact hJ hxI
    · have hxU : x ∈ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := ⟨hA' hx, hxI⟩
      have hxSymm : x ∈ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := Or.inl ⟨hx, hxI⟩
      have : x ∈ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ (B ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) :=
        hUAB ▸ ⟨hxU, hxSymm⟩
      have hxSymmB : x ∈ B ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := this.2
      rcases hxSymmB with ⟨hxB, -⟩ | ⟨hxI', hxBnot⟩
      · exact hxB
      · exact False.elim (hxBnot (hI hxI'))
  have hBAsub : B ⊆ A := by
    intro x hx
    by_cases hxI : x ∈ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
    · exact hI hxI
    · have hxU : x ∈ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := ⟨hB' hx, hxI⟩
      have hxSymm : x ∈ B ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := Or.inl ⟨hx, hxI⟩
      have : x ∈ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ (A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) :=
        ⟨hxU, by simpa [hUAB] using hxSymm⟩
      have hxSymmA : x ∈ A ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := this.2
      rcases hxSymmA with ⟨hxA, -⟩ | ⟨hxI', hxAnot⟩
      · exact hxA
      · exact False.elim (hxAnot (hJ hxI'))
  exact Set.Subset.antisymm hABsub hBAsub
